name: The Game: Towards Zero
overview: Tae Pyeong is a prophet. When he looks into someone's eye, he can see the moment right before they die. Tae Pyeong is smart, rich and handsome. Despite his special ability, he is a bright person. A mysterious serial murder case draws Tae Pyeong's attention. He partners with Detective Joon Young to solve the string of murders.

trailers.title: [더 게임:0시를 향하여] 죽음을 보는 예언가 '옥택연' 강렬 눈빛 첫 등장! ＜더 게임＞ 1차 티저
